name: CENTRAL MOTEK Co.Ltd.
summary: CENTRAL MOTEK Co.Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive parts. The company offers axle assembly, aluminum forging, steering, suspension, engine, front and rear brake axle module, power train, and transmission parts. It markets its products in Asia, North America, Europe, and Australia. CENTRAL MOTEK Co.Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Gimhae, South Korea.
